channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly Tipped rubbish on pavement, 14th April
item.description:
Fly tipped rubbish blocking the pavement and attaching further rubbish and dog poo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole appeared in Hook Lane Welling junction of Yorkland Avenue, 14th April
item.description:
There is a pothole appeared in Hook Lane by the junction with Yorkland Avenue which is getting bigger over time.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cumberland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extremely large and deep pothole - 2 to 3m diameter, 14th April
item.description:
There is a very large pothole around the middle of the section of Longland Drive between Greenway and Laurel Way. It is very dangerous, 2 or 3m diameter and about at least 50cm deep and will damage any car or bus that drives over it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Longland Drive, Woodside Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car remains, 14th April
item.description:
Silver smart car has been abandoned after crash. Has abandoned sticker on since 23rd march 26.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pyrmont Grove, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped fridge, 14th April
item.description:
Fly tipped fridge Been there for 2 weeks Dangerous can fall on someone

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Forburg Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight here on during the day, 14th April
item.description:
One of the streetlights on the left hand side here if going towards Blackheath common is on during the day can council attend and repair
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vanbrugh Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 14th April
item.description:
Today I have spotted dog fouling in four locations on pavements on Corelli Road. In addition to this being a health hazard, the pavements are used by circa 1k students accessing Leigh Academy Halley, staff, and more students using the primary school around the corner. Dog fouling on this street is an ongoing issue what has not been addressed.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Corelli Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over a week there, 14th April
item.description:
Why doesn't the council clean the streets ?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Darenth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Half drain cover missing, 14th April
item.description:
Super dangerous as half of the drain cover is missing, a child could possibly fall in it its that big and it is right next to a school very dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Little Acre, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging branches and Brambles, 14th April
item.description:
There are overhanging branches and brambles that are at face level. These are thorny and need removing and are overhanging from the gardens on Clissold Crescent
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clissold Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole near Crofton school, 14th April
item.description:
This pothole has been here for a few months and has not been sorted. It is on a bend and difficult to avoid. It is very deep

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Towncourt Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass all over pavement, 14th April
item.description:
There is glass all over the pavement someone or someone's animal is going to get injured. Glass has been there for over 48 hours now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wyatt Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged pavement all along Chartwell Close, 14th April
item.description:
The paving slabs are broken all along Chartwell Close and needs repairing. This is a trip hazard. The paving slabs have not been fixed since 1984.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Chartwell Close, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree fell down across path, breaking fence, 14th April
item.description:
This tree fell down a few weeks ago, breaking the fence and blocking the footpath. Still not been attended to

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beddington Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One way street marking ineffective, 14th April
item.description:
Request for better one way street marking (eg arrows on road surface). Vehicles, particularly moped/motorcycle delivery riders riding the wrong way down a one way street. This is becoming increasingly dangerous to pedestrians where on street parking prevents use of much of the pavement on the street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victoria Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 14th April
item.description:
I collected 3 bin bags full of rubbish from this park area, and found all of these dumped materials. The need to be collected for the safety of people who use the park. The park is located down an unmarked lane. It is the lane between Kemnal Road and Woodside Avenue in Chislehurst. It is directly behind the end house at Copperfield Way.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car parts, 14th April
item.description:
2 very large car parts dumped in the road outside my house a couple of nights ago. We are on a very busy industrial road,its obstructing where cars pull in to allow passing traffic

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip again, 14th April
item.description:
Can this be removed please ? Thankyou x

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Athelstan Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders burning commercial waste, 14th April
item.description:
The builders at 30 Ingleby Way are having ANOTHER bonfire today, burning their commercial waste. The smell is terrible, it’s permeating throughout my house even with the windows closed. The flames are so high they’re roaring up above the fence. They burn their waste material every single week. I hope you can do something about this and get them to use a professional waste disposal service like everybody else.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cow Path, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa was blocking the foot pass, 14th April
item.description:
Sofa was blocking footpath - has been lifted and placed between property 18 & 20.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crane Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
